 title: Add tests for get_references live LSP and index edge cases
 ---
 ops/get_references.rs

Coverage: 82.7% (86/104 lines)

Uncovered lines: 121, 123-127, 129-130, 134-135, 137-139, 145, 176, 181, 191, 260

Three areas:
1. `try_live_lsp` (lines 113-154) - builds URI, constructs params with includeDeclaration, sends textDocument/references, parses/enriches
2. `try_lsp_index` (lines 176, 181) - call edge conversion when call_sites is empty
3. `try_treesitter` (line 260)

Test scenarios:
- Mock LSP returning references → verify SourceLayer::LiveLsp
- include_declaration:false properly set in request
- Insert call edge with empty from_ranges → verify symbol's own range used as reference location

#coverage-gap #coverage-gap
\ No newline at end of file
